title: antirrhinum orontium subvar. leiocarpum
intro: Antirrhinum orontium subvar. leiocarpum, commonly known as the yellow snapdragon or leopard snapdragon, is a flowering plant species within the snapdragon family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Antirrhinum orontium subvar. leiocarpum have been used in herbal medicine for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The plant is said to offer health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting digestive health. The leaves and stems can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these herbal preparations.
